# NTSZOT Appliance Repair

> In-home appliance repair across San Diego County, CA. $80 service call fee — waived if we repair it. 60-day parts and labor warranty on every repair. All major brands. Available Mon–Fri 9:00 AM–6:00 PM, Sat 10:00 AM–5:00 PM, Sun closed. Call (619) 488-4477.

NTSZOT Appliance Repair is a San Diego-based appliance repair service operated by Andrei Zotolokin. The company provides same-visit in-home repair for all major household appliances throughout San Diego County. No factory outlet, no storefront — a technician comes to the customer's home.

## Key Facts

- Phone: (619) 488-4477
- Email: ntszotservice@gmail.com
- Address: 3712 Mt Abbey Ave, San Diego, CA 92111
- Hours: Mon–Fri 9:00 AM–6:00 PM | Sat 10:00 AM–5:00 PM | Sun closed
- Service call fee: $80 flat — waived if we repair the appliance
- Warranty: 60 days on all parts and labor
- Service model: In-home only — technician comes to you
- Payment: Cash, Check, Zelle, Venmo (no fee) | Card (3.5% fee, disclosed upfront)
- Service area: San Diego County, CA

## Services

- [Washer Repair](https://ntszotservice.com/services/washer-repair/): $250–$350
- [Dryer Repair](https://ntszotservice.com/services/dryer-repair/): $250–$350
- [Oven / Range / Stove Repair](https://ntszotservice.com/services/oven-range-stove-repair/): $250–$350
- [Dishwasher Repair](https://ntszotservice.com/services/dishwasher-repair/): $250–$350
- [Refrigerator Repair](https://ntszotservice.com/services/refrigerator-repair/): $350–$900
- [Freezer Repair](https://ntszotservice.com/services/freezer-repair/): $350–$900
- [Ice Maker Repair](https://ntszotservice.com/services/ice-maker-repair/): $350–$900
- [Microwave Repair](https://ntszotservice.com/services/microwave-repair/): $250–$350
- [Range Hood Repair](https://ntszotservice.com/services/range-hood-repair/): $250–$350
- [Appliance Installation](https://ntszotservice.com/services/appliance-installation/): $220–$350
- [Annual Maintenance Plan](https://ntszotservice.com/services/annual-maintenance-plan/): $350/year + parts, 2 visits

All major brands with no restrictions, including:
